description: Hate speech, slurs, and explicitly toxic content targeting individuals or groups

scenarios.description: Clear ethnic slur — unambiguous violation, first offense
scenarios.postText: All [slur] should go back where they came from, nobody wants them here
scenarios.expectedReasoning: explicit hate speech targeting an ethnic group

scenarios.description: Sarcastic comment that reads as toxic out of context
scenarios.postText: Oh great, another genius takes the wheel. Truly a masterpiece of human thought.
scenarios.expectedReasoning: sarcasm with no specific target and no slur — borderline but not a clear violation

scenarios.description: Repeat offender with prior removals — same type of content escalates to ban
scenarios.postText: These [slur] are ruining everything as usual
scenarios.expectedReasoning: prior removal for hate speech + new clear violation triggers escalation
